rules.title: Small-scale A/R activities eligible when total area < 16,000 ha and participants grouped as defined.
rules.logic: Project qualifies as small-scale afforestation/reforestation when aggregated area under the plan remains below the UNFCCC threshold and land eligibility evidence is maintained.

rules.title: Non-permanence risk buffer determined via Tool 15 and updated when risk profile changes.
rules.logic: Allocate a proportional buffer contribution using Tool 15 risk matrix and adjust if threats or safeguards evolve.

rules.title: Normative tools and references (Tools 02, 08, 12, 14, 15, 16) must be accessible to grouped project manager.
rules.logic: Project maintains accessible copies of required normative tools and references listed in the methodology.

rules.title: Annual net removals computed as sum of pool changes minus leakage and emissions, divided by years between measurements.
rules.logic: Annualized carbon stock change ΔC_year = (C_t2 - C_t1) / T applied for each pool before emissions and leakage are deducted.

rules.title: Annexes include participant enrollment records, training logs, and dispute resolution evidence.
rules.logic: Annex materials capture supporting evidence such as participant lists, training certificates, and grievance records.

rules.title: Definitions for grouped smallholder projects include participants, monitoring entity, and leakage belt.
rules.logic: The methodology defines grouped project participant roles, monitoring entity responsibilities, and leakage belt boundaries.

rules.title: Project boundary includes above- and below-ground biomass, dead wood, litter, and soil carbon pools unless excluded with justification.
rules.logic: Project boundary encompasses all significant carbon pools and on-site emissions sources; excluded pools set to zero emissions by rule.

rules.title: Baseline scenario assumes continuation of pre-project land use with carbon stock change set to zero.
rules.logic: Baseline carbon stock change set to zero under conservative assumption that lands remain degraded without project intervention.

rules.title: Project removals calculated by summing carbon stock changes per pool minus fossil fuel and fertilizer emissions.
rules.logic: Net project removals equal the sum of pool-based carbon stock changes minus project emissions from fuel use, vehicles, and fertilizer application.

rules.title: Leakage from activity shifting or market effects monitored and deducted using Tool 14 default factors.
rules.logic: Leakage emissions from displaced activities quantified with standardized coefficients from Tool 14 and deducted from net removals.

rules.title: Monitoring plan requires permanent plots measured every five years plus tracking of grouped participant compliance.
rules.logic: Implement monitoring plan with permanent sample plots, participant reporting forms, and QA/QC checks consistent with Tool 16.

rules.title: Data and parameters table specifies default biomass factors and sampling requirements.
rules.logic: Maintain dataset of project parameters including default biomass expansion factors, root-shoot ratios, and wood density values.

rules.title: Uncertainty calculated per Tool 12; apply deductions when precision exceeds 10%.
rules.logic: Combine sampling and model uncertainty and apply Tool 12 deduction factors when required precision not achieved.
